# Legacy Trae Context (Reference)

This file preserves useful project context previously stored under `.trae/`.

## Game overview
The project is a 2D fighting game implemented with C++ and OpenGL.  
No external assets are required; visuals and audio are generated programmatically.

## Historical notes
- Earlier tooling used a `.trae/` directory for agent-related instructions/specs.
- GitHub Copilot project guidance is now centralized under `.github/`.

## Development references
- Build and test script: `./scripts/build_and_test.sh`
- Main targets:
  - `//src:main`
  - `//test:agent_test`
